headline: Eye Doctor in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained ophthalmologist Dr. Rajeswari, seeing patients right here in KK Nagar -- the same doctor for every visit, from a routine checkup to surgery.
metaDescription: Looking for an eye doctor in KK Nagar, Chennai? Dr. Rajeswari (AIIMS, DNB, FAICO) offers comprehensive eye exams, cataract surgery, and LASIK nearby.

whyPatientsChoose.title: One Doctor, Every Visit
whyPatientsChoose.description: You see Dr. Rajeswari personally -- not a different doctor or a junior resident each time you come in.

processSteps.title: Book Your Visit
processSteps.description: Choose a slot online or call us directly -- we're on Double Tank Road, near Bashyam Apartments and A.P. Super Market.

processSteps.title: Meet Dr. Rajeswari
processSteps.description: A thorough, unhurried consultation -- enough time to actually ask your questions.

processSteps.title: A Clear Plan
processSteps.description: Whether it's glasses, monitoring, or treatment, you leave knowing exactly what's next and why.

landingFaqs.question: Will I actually see the same doctor every time, or does it rotate?
landingFaqs.answer: You see Dr. Rajeswari directly, for every visit -- from your first consultation through any follow-up or treatment. There's no rotation between different doctors.

landingFaqs.question: What are Dr. Rajeswari's qualifications?
landingFaqs.answer: Dr. Rajeswari is AIIMS-trained (MD), holds a DNB and FAICO in Neuro-ophthalmology, and has completed a Medical Retina Fellowship -- with experience across general ophthalmology, surgical care, and complex retinal and neuro-ophthalmic conditions.

landingFaqs.question: Is the clinic easy to find from nearby areas like Ashok Nagar or Vadapalani?
landingFaqs.answer: Yes -- we're centrally located in KK Nagar, an easy, short drive from Ashok Nagar, Vadapalani, Jafferkhanpet, West Mambalam, and Virugambakkam, with the exact map link available when you book.

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: A common worry I hear is not knowing who you'll actually see -- some clinics rotate doctors, or you only get a few rushed minutes.
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: When you come to me, you're my patient for that visit and every one after it. I take the time to explain what I'm seeing and why, because an eye exam shouldn't feel transactional -- especially when it's something as personal as your vision.
